# The Fly Trap — a finer diner

> A neighborhood breakfast-and-lunch diner on Woodward in Ferndale, Michigan. Buzzin' since 2004. Walk-in only, open 8a–3p every day.

## Facts
- Name: The Fly Trap (a finer diner)
- Address: 22950 Woodward Avenue, Ferndale, MI 48220, USA
- Phone: (248) 399-5150
- Email: dine@theflytrapferndale.com
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM (open every day)
- Reservations: none — walk-in only. Municipal lot behind the building plus street parking on Woodward.
- Cuisine: American, breakfast, brunch, diner. Full vegetarian selection.
- Price range: $$ (most mains $13–$19)
- Order takeout: https://order.toasttab.com/online/the-fly-trap-ferndale-22950-woodward-avenue
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theflytrapferndale/
- Established: December 28, 2004

## About
The Fly Trap opened December 28, 2004. The name is a punchy homage to the space's predecessor, paired with "a finer diner" — the vision for the place. Specials are the "daily buzz," carry-out is "on the fly," and the bar is "bar fly." The restaurant was featured on Food Network's Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives with Guy Fieri, which put the Ferndale spot on the national map.

## Signature dishes
- Green Eggs and Ham — poblano pesto, jack cheese, seared city ham
- Huevos Rancheros — two eggs, black beans, jack cheese, jalapeños, pico
- Cowboy Curtis — seared flank steak, two eggs, wildwest sauce
- Red Chili Salmon Burger — the dish Guy Fieri featured on Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
- Daily Buzz — a rotating dish every morning, plus soup of the day and a Sugar Shack pastry

## Press
- Food Network — Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives (Guy Fieri)
- Islands (2026) — Michigan's funky Ferndale diner
- Hour Detroit — reviews (2009, 2025)
- Crain's Detroit Business (2024) — founders return to take over the diner
- Food Network Magazine — 50 States, 50 Breakfasts (Michigan's pick)
